response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build developer tooling
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership or distributed systems leadership
Lacks documented experience in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or establishing architectural best practices at scale
